name: Steamed Dumplings
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all the ingredients except the wonton wrappers in a mixing bowl. Mix very well.
2. Place 1 wonton wrapper in your hand (the center should cover your palm), then put 1 tablespoon of the filling in the center of the wrapper. Gently squeeze and twist the wrapper to form a "money bag" shape. Repeat until all the filling has been used.
3. Put the dumplings in a bamboo steamer and steam for 10 minutes.
4. Serve while the dumplings are very hot. Makes 4 servings.
